overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking along a rural dirt path at night. The scene progresses from a walled country lane to an open landscape under a large moon, with a distant red glow becoming visible on the horizon.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a dirt path bordered by a stone wall on the left

entered.detail: low stone wall running parallel to the path on the left side
unpaved dirt trail forming the walking surface
dark silhouettes of trees visible in the distance on the right

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a dark nighttime scene on a rural dirt path enclosed by a stone wall on the left. The camera follows Geralt from behind as he walks forward, with sparse vegetation visible on the right and minimal ambient light.

events.description: large full moon becomes visible in the night sky ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the path as the landscape opens up and moonlight increases visibility

entered.detail: large pale moon rising in the night sky directly ahead

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wider landscape as the stone wall disappears behind. The full moon becomes prominently visible in the sky ahead, casting a pale blue light over the scene. The terrain remains a dirt trail with scattered trees now visible on both sides.

events.description: red-orange glow becomes visible in the distance on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: walking toward the distant red light source while the moon remains prominent overhead

entered.detail: faint red-orange glow suggesting a distant fire or light source
low wooden fence posts appearing on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the path continuing under the large moon, with a distinct red glow now visible in the distance on the left. A wooden fence appears along the left side of the path as the character approaches the distant light source, maintaining the steady walking pace through the open night landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt path that transitions from a confined lane into an expansive, moonlit landscape. It begins by following Geralt from behind as he walks through a dark nighttime scene enclosed by a stone wall on the left and sparse vegetation on the right. As the stone wall disappears behind, the path opens into a wider terrain where a prominent full moon emerges in the sky, casting a pale blue light over the scattered trees. The scene then shifts as the character continues forward under the moonlight, with a wooden fence appearing along the left side of the trail. Finally, the camera maintains its steady pace as a distinct red glow becomes visible on the distant horizon.
